audit_items.proof_trace: The guard `if (s_auctionStarts[asset] != 0) { revert LiveAuction(); }` at L327-329 executes for every asset in `eligibleAssets` before the only write to `s_auctionStarts[asset]` at L353. Grep confirms no other code path sets this mapping. Within-call duplicates are also caught because the mapping is updated in the first iteration before the second iteration's check runs.
